Meta.title: GraceBridge — Ministry Support Platform
Meta.description: A multilingual platform that helps pastors prepare sermons and helps believers understand Scripture.

Landing.heroTagline: An AI sermon partner for pastors
Landing.heroTitle: Lighten the load of preparation, and dwell deeper in the Word
Landing.heroSubtitle: GraceBridge is a multilingual ministry platform that helps pastors prepare sermons and helps believers understand Scripture more clearly.
Landing.feature1Desc: Choose the passage, season, audience, and length, and build the framework of your sermon from outline to application questions.
Landing.feature2Desc: Browse slides, videos, and resources organized by the structure of all 66 books of the Bible.
Landing.feature3Desc: Korean, English, French, Spanish, German. Both the interface and generated content are multilingual.
Landing.disclaimer: AI-generated content on this platform is a reference to aid sermon preparation. Please complete your final sermon through prayer, meditation, and theological review.

Auth.pastorNote: When you register as a pastor, full features such as the sermon writer become available after administrator approval. Until then, you have member access.
Auth.signupSuccess: Registration complete. Please check your email.

Errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again shortly.
Errors.notAuthorized: You do not have permission to access this page.
